level_signals: At least 5 years of direct product management experience; 7+ years preferred
Staff PM title signals senior IC above Senior PM
Base pay Zone 1 $191K–$225K consistent with Staff-level IC
Expected to shape product vision and priorities across team and company

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: At least 5 years of direct product management experience building high-quality consumer products
A strong sense of urgency and speed, with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-moving environment
High standards and a strong work ethic - you always bring your best and expect your colleagues to do the same
Delight in bringing innovation and impact to customers, particularly in complex and dynamic environments

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in fintech products is a plus, but not required

scope.surface: Core banking and spending products; platform capabilities powering next-generation banking experiences for consumers
primary_metrics_inferred: Product adoption and activation for banking/spending features
core_responsibilities: Lead a team of engineers, designers, researchers, data scientists, and operators to better understand customers and their most pressing needs
Establishing a product vision and shared set of priorities across the team and the company, which meet the most important needs of our customers
Collaborate with cross functional stakeholders such as legal, compliance, operations, finance, and customer success to ensure products are built the right way
Drive execution from concept through launch, including defining success metrics and iterating based on results

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of total compensation package

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed across three geographic zones
Equity and bonus mentioned in addition to base pay
Clear product surface (banking and spending platform for consumers)
Strong cross-functional scope signals high-impact role
Fintech experience listed as a plus, not required — opens applicant pool
Generous benefits package including 100% paid health insurance and mental health support
red_flags: Hybrid requirement of at least 3 days per week in office (Menlo Park, New York, or Washington DC) eliminates remote candidates
No visa sponsorship status mentioned — unclear for non-US candidates
7+ years preferred language suggests the 5-year minimum may be a soft floor for a Staff-level role
Relatively sparse on technical banking/regulatory depth requirements for a Staff PM on a banking product

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Staff PM' and compensation range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
compensation.base_range_usd uses Zone 1 figures as primary range (Menlo Park/NY/DC); Zones 2 and 3 also stated in JD
ambiguities: The JD lists Bellevue, WA in the Zone 1 compensation table but does not list it as an office location for this role; cities_listed reflects only the three explicitly named office locations for the role.
Visa sponsorship not mentioned anywhere in the JD; marked as 'unclear'.
The 5-year minimum vs 7+ preferred distinction creates ambiguity about true floor for a Staff-level hire; treated 5 years as hard minimum and 7+ as soft preference.
